reviews.comment:
Personal súper amable. Recomendable para cargar y descansar un rato.

(Translated by Google)
Super friendly staff. Recommended for a quick recharge and a break.

reviews.comment:
En el Full un solo empleado para cobrar, vender y preparar los desayunos y el agua caliente para el termo.

(Translated by Google)
At Full, there is only one employee to collect payment, sell, and prepare breakfasts and hot water for the thermos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtZ3ZIMnFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, un poco elevados los precios del service shop pero bueno es lo único que hay en la zona, siempre que vamos de viaje paramos en ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the service shop prices are a bit high but it's the only option in the area, we always stop there when we travel

Excellent service, but the prices at the bar are killing you.

reviews.comment:
Linda gasolinera

(Translated by Google)
Nice gas station
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaEozYWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Espectacular lugar para darse un respiro en la ruta, excelente la atención recibida de todo el personal de la estación de servicio, riquísimo café con leche y medialunas, sabrosos los sándwich y los criollitos, amplio lugar con espacio para fumadores y no fumadores, baños impecables de limpios, reciben tarjetas de crédito, de débito y efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
A spectacular place to take a break from the road. Excellent service from the entire service station staff. Delicious coffee with milk and croissants. Tasty sandwiches and criollitos. Spacious space with space for smokers and non-smokers. Clean, impeccable bathrooms. They accept credit cards, debit cards, and cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLUlLTERREAE

reviews.comment:
Mejoraron el estado de los baños. Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are in better condition. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdVBYeXpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
En el medio de la nada, aparece la salvacion.Un lugar agradable para tomarse un descanso en medio de la ruta. Los chicos muy atentos y rápidos en la atención. Super recomendable

(Translated by Google)
In the middle of nowhere, salvation appears. A pleasant place to take a break along the way. The staff are very attentive and quick to serve. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNkpPaHNBRRAB
